ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of cookie (e.g., performance-enhancing) */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Explanation of what the cookie does */,
  "storage_period" TEXT /* Duration for which the cookie is stored */,
  "description_long" TEXT /* Longer description of the cookie's purpose and usage */,
  "cookie_category" TEXT /* Categorization of the cookie (e.g., performance, targeting) */,
  "storage_duration" INTEGER /* Duration for which the cookie is stored in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "domain_name" TEXT /* Domain name of the website */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client owning the website */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the website was added to the system */,
  "website_type" TEXT /* Type of website (e.g., e-commerce, blog) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the website belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_websites_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client organization */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the client */,
  "account_creation" TEXT /* Date when the client account was created */,
  "company_description" TEXT /* Description of the client company */,
  "address" TEXT /* Client company address */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Client company phone number */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user session */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website being tracked */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "session_start" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "session_end" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the user */,
  "os" TEXT /* Operating system used by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user interaction */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session in which the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., click, scroll) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the interaction */,
  "interaction_value" TEXT /* Additional information about the interaction (e.g., scroll depth) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_interactions_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "heatmaps" (
  "heatmap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each heatmap record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website corresponding to the heatmap */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session from which the heatmap data was generated */,
  "heatmap_data" TEXT /* JSON data representing the heatmap */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the heatmap was generated */,
  "heatmap_type" TEXT /* Type of heatmap (e.g., click, scroll) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("heatmap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmaps_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES user_sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_heatmaps_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookies_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie usage record */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website where the cookie is used */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie being used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_usage_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_usage_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the report is for */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* JSON data containing analytics report details */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action performed */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the action performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the role_id in the user_roles table */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view reports, manage users) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
